changeSet.author: adiakite
changeSet.comment: Add ARV Treatment Regime dictionary category if not present

changeSet.author: adiakite
changeSet.comment: Add ARV Treatment Regime dictionary entries
changeSet.sql: WITH category AS ( SELECT id FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE name = 'ARV Treatment Regime List' LIMIT 1 ) INSERT INTO clinlims.dictionary (id, is_active, dict_entry, lastupdated, dictionary_category_id, display_key, sort_order) SELECT nextval('clinlims.dictionary_seq'), 'Y', entry, now(), (SELECT id FROM category), 'dictionary.arv.regime.' || lower(replace(replace(replace(replace(entry, ' ', '_'), '/', '_'), '.', ''), '-', '_')), sort_ord FROM (VALUES ('ABC 3TC EFV', 1), ('ABC 3TC IDV/r', 2), ('ABC 3TC LPV/r', 3), ('ABC 3TC NVP', 4), ('ABC 3TC SQV/r', 5), ('ABC DDI EFV', 6), ('ABC DDI IDV/r', 7), ('ABC DDI LPV/r', 8), ('ABC DDI SQV/r', 9), ('AZT 3TC DDI', 10), ('AZT 3TC IDV', 11), ('AZT 3TC IDV/r', 12), ('AZT 3TC NFV', 13), ('AZT 3TC NVP', 14), ('AZT 3TC SQV', 15), ('AZT 3TC SQV/r', 16), ('AZT 3TC TDF', 17), ('AZT ABC DDI', 18), ('AZT DDI EFV', 19), ('AZT DDI IDV/r', 20), ('AZT DDI LPV/r', 21), ('AZT DDI SQV/r', 22), ('AZT TDF FTC', 23), ('DDI 3TC EFV', 24), ('DDI 3TC IDV/r', 25), ('DDI 3TC LPV/r', 26), ('DDI 3TC NVP', 27), ('DDI 3TC SQV/r', 28), ('TDF 3TC EFV', 29), ('TDF 3TC IDV/r', 30), ('TDF 3TC LPV/r', 31), ('TDF 3TC NVP', 32), ('TDF 3TC SQV/r', 33), ('TDF DDI IDV/r', 34), ('TDF DDI LPV/r', 35), ('TDF FTC ABC', 36), ('TDF FTC LPV/r', 37), ('TDF FTC NVP', 38), ('RLT', 39), ('AZT 3TC ABC', 40), ('AZT 3TC EFV', 41), ('TDF 3TC RLT LPV/r', 42), ('TDF RLT ATZ/r', 43), ('TDF 3TC EFV DRV RLT/r', 44), ('TDF DRV RLT/r', 45), ('TDF 3TC DRV RLT/r', 46), ('TDF 3TC DRV/r', 47), ('DRV RLT/r EFV', 48), ('AZT 3TC DRV/r', 49), ('AZT 3TC DRV RLT/r', 50), ('ABC 3TC DRV/r', 51), ('ABC 3TC DRV RLT/r', 52), ('TDF ABC 3TC ATZ/r', 53), ('TDF 3TC EFV LPV/r', 54), ('TDF 3TC EFV ATZ/r', 55), ('LPV/r SQV/r', 56), ('AZT 3TC LPV/r', 57), ('D4T 3TC ABC', 58), ('D4T 3TC EFV', 59), ('D4T 3TC IDV/r', 60), ('D4T 3TC IDV', 61), ('D4T 3TC LPV/r', 62), ('D4T 3TC NFV', 63), ('D4T 3TC NVP', 64), ('D4T 3TC SQV/r', 65), ('D4T 3TC SQV', 66), ('D4T 3TC DDI', 67), ('D4T DDI EFV', 68), ('D4T DDI IDV/r', 69), ('D4T DDI LPV/r', 70), ('TDF FTC EFV', 71), ('AZT ABC LPV/r', 72), ('LPV/r 3TC EFV', 73), ('AZT 3TC RLT', 74), ('AZT 3TC LPV/r/r', 75), ('AZT 3TC NVP TDF', 76), ('AZT 3TC ATZ/r', 77), ('AZT 3TC TDF ATZ/r', 78), ('AZT 3TC TDF SQV/r', 79), ('ATZ/RTV EFV', 80), ('ATZ/r LPV/r', 81), ('EFV LPV/r', 82), ('LPV/r', 83), ('AZT 3TC NVP LPV/r', 84), ('AZT 3TC TDF LPV/r', 85), ('AZT 3TC TDF LPV/r/r', 86), ('AZT 3TC ABC LPV/r', 87), ('TDF LPV/r EFV', 88), ('TDF 3TC LPV/r/r', 89), ('TDF LPV/RTV EFV', 90), ('TDF 3TC EFV AZT 3TC', 91), ('ABC 3TC ATZ/r', 92), ('TDF 3TC ATZ/r', 93), ('AZT FTC LPV/r', 94), ('TDF ABC LPV/r', 95), ('AZT 3TC ATV/r', 96), ('TDF 3TC ATV/r', 97), ('TDF FTC ATV/r', 98), ('TDF 3TC DTG', 99), ('AZT 3TC DTG', 100), ('ABC 3TC DTG', 101), ('DDI 3TC DTG', 102), ('TDF FTC DTG', 103), ('TDF 3TC DTG DTG', 104), ('ATZ-r 3TC DTG', 105), ('TDF 3TC ABC', 106), ('ABC 3TC AZT', 107), ('ABC 3TC ATV/r', 108), ('AZT 3TC LPV/r/RTV', 109), ('TDF 3TC LPV/r/RTV', 110) ) AS data(entry, sort_ord) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.dictionary d JOIN category c ON d.dictionary_category_id = c.id WHERE d.dict_entry = data.entry );
